title: Sandwich ELISA for the quantification of alpha-synuclein
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7c268","text":"This protocol details the procedure to quantify total alpha-synuclein from tissue and biological fluids by ELISA.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3c88d","text":"Materials:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f9h8v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c11fq","text":"Coating buffer: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e3grj","text":"      NaHCO3   200 mM    Sodium azide (pH9.6)  0.02%  ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":54}],"data":{}},{"key":"ep4rc","text":" Blocking buffer: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7s8f9","text":"      PBS      Gelatin  2.50%    Tween  0.03%  ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":47}],"data":{}},{"key":"994n3","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","1_0":"","1_1":""},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":["172","140"],"data":[["NaHCO3","\u0026nbsp;200 mM"],["Sodium azide (pH9.6)","0.02%"]],"guid":"FE1A947E794D11ECB5450A58A9FEAC02","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["NaHCO3","\u0026nbsp;200 mM"],["Sodium azide (pH9.6)","0.02%"]],"rowHeights":[23,23]}},"1":{"type":"tables","mutability":"","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","2_0":"","2_1":""},"colTitles":["",""],"colWidths":["101",48],"data":[["PBS",""],["Gelatin","2.50%"],["Tween","0.03%"]],"guid":"394E4117794E11ECB5450A58A9FEAC02","isJexcelDataFormat":true,"legend":"","mergeCells":{},"printData":[["PBS",""],["Gelatin","2.50%"],["Tween","0.03%"]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23]}}}}
steps: Note: Antibody pairing determined based on sample type and should be optimized.
Coat 384-well plate with primary antibody.
Make Coating buffer 200 millimolar (mM) NaHCO 3 with 0.02% sodium azide ( pH 9.6 ).
1 0 antibody most used is syn1 at 1:500 dilution (BD 610787).
Add 25 µL per well (avoiding outer wells).
Incubate on rocker at 4 °C Overnight .
Make blocking buffer (PBS+2.5% gelatin, 0.025% tween).
Wash plate 3X using 1xPBS-T in plate washer.
Blot on paper towel.
Add 80 µL per well of blocking buffer.
Incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00 .
During incubation, prepare standards and samples On ice , dilute in blocking buffer (BB).
Standards – use full length recombinant alpha-synuclein. Stock aliquoted upon opening.
Make serial dilutions in blocking buffer, starting from 10 ng/μl stock.
Dilute samples in blocking buffer.
Wash plate 3X, blot on paper towel.
Add 25 µL per well of standards and samples (in duplicate).
Incubate at Room temperature for 02:00:00 .
Bring blocking buffer to Room temperature before use.
Dilute detection antibody in blocking buffer. 2 o antibody most used is biotinylated-hSA4, at 1:200 dilution (commercially MJFR1 ab138501; biotinylated in-lab).
Wash plate 3X, blot on paper towel.
Add 25 µL per well of detection antibody.
Incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00 .
Wash plate 5X, blot on paper towel.
Use avidin-alkaline phosphatase at 0.6 μl/ml of blocking buffer.
Add 25 µL per well of AAP.
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 .
Make pNPP - 1 of each tablet for 5 mL ddH 2 O (cover tube in aluminum, rock to dissolve).
Wash plate 5X, blot on paper towel.
Add 25 µL /well of pNPP, read plate immediately.
Read absorbance at 405nm, every 2.5 minutes for 01:00:00 .
Use data from a read when the standards are linear.
creator: Julianna Tomlinson
